Once integrated, users can select shipping carriers on inventory operations in their Odoo database.

Product: Odoo
Title: Measuring volumetric weight

volumetric weight (Volumetric weight is the volume that a package
occupies when in transit. In other words it is the physical size of a package)

Many carriers have several measures for weight. There is the actual weight of the products in the
parcel, and there is the *volumetric weight*

relations.target: Sendcloud: How to calculate & automate parcel volumetric weight
